Figurative Meaning: To be very confused or overwhelmed
Cultural Origin or Historical Reference: Refers to traditional spinning mechanisms once common in Kashubian villages

Syntactic Structure & Grammatical Form: Infinitive phrase with reflexive restraint meaning
Figurative Meaning: To keep a secret or stay silent
